mapper.sql: id, store_id, logistics_id, `status`, create_time, create_by, update_by, update_time, delete_flag
mapper.insert: insert into store_logistics (id, store_id, logistics_id, `status`, create_time, create_by, update_by, update_time, delete_flag) values (#{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{storeId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{logisticsId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{status,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{createBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{updateBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{deleteFlag,jdbcType=INTEGER})

mapper.update:
update store_logistics
store_id = #{storeId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
logistics_id = #{logisticsId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
`status` = #{status,jdbcType=INTEGER},
create_time = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
create_by = #{createBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
update_by = #{updateBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
delete_flag = #{deleteFlag,jdbcType=INTEGER},
where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}

update store_logistics set store_id = #{storeId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, logistics_id = #{logisticsId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, `status` = #{status,jdbcType=INTEGER}, create_time = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, create_by = #{createBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, update_by = #{updateBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, delete_flag = #{deleteFlag,jdbcType=INTEGER} where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}

insert into store_logistics (id, store_id, logistics_id, `status`, create_time, create_by, update_by, update_time, delete_flag) values
